symbols.name: ActiveEntityInMemoryProvider
symbols.summary: In-memory implementation of IEntityProvider for testing purposes.

syntax.content: public class ActiveEntityInMemoryProvider : IActiveEntityEntityProvider where TEntity : class, IEntity

symbols.name: ActiveEntityInMemoryProvider(ILoggerFactory, ActiveEntityInMemoryProviderOptions)
symbols.summary: Initializes a new instance of the InMemoryProvider class.

syntax.content: public ActiveEntityInMemoryProvider(ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, ActiveEntityInMemoryProviderOptions options = null)

parameters.description: The logger.
Configuration options for the in-memory provider.
The logger.
Configuration options for the in-memory provider.

symbols.summary: Initializes a new instance of the InMemoryProvider class using a builder.

parameters.description: The builder for configuration options.
